description: Demo project for a simple Todo application.

requirements.title: Manage todo lifecycle
requirements.desc: The system shall allow a user to create, edit, and delete todo items via the web interface.

requirements.title: Track completion state
requirements.desc: The system shall allow a user to mark a todo as done and to revert a done todo to open.

requirements.title: Filter by status
requirements.desc: The system shall provide todo list filtering for all, open, and done states.

requirements.title: Persist todo data
requirements.desc: The system shall persist todo data in a local SQLite database so todo state is retained after application restart.

requirements.title: Store extra task context
requirements.desc: The system shall support optional description and tags fields for each todo item.

tests.name: Create todo from form
tests.action: Open app, submit title plus optional fields, and verify new item appears in the list.

tests.name: Edit existing todo
tests.action: Click Edit, change title and description, save, and verify list shows updated values.

tests.name: Delete todo
tests.action: Create a todo, click Delete, confirm dialog, and verify item is removed.

tests.name: Toggle done state
tests.action: Click checkbox on an open todo and verify item is styled as completed; click again to reopen.

tests.name: Filter open and done lists
tests.action: Create two todos, complete one, switch between Open and Done filters, and verify correct items are shown.

tests.name: Data survives restart
tests.action: Create a todo, restart Flask server, reload app, and verify the todo is still present.

tests.name: Persist description and tags
tests.action: Create a todo with description and tags, reload page, and verify both fields remain visible.

issues.title: Edit flow cannot clear description
issues.note: If edit prompt is cancelled, current UI keeps the previous description and gives no feedback.

issues.title: Add pagination for long todo lists
issues.note: Current filter view is functional but not optimized for teams with 200+ todos.

issues.title: Improve validation messaging for empty titles
issues.note: API now returns explicit 'Title is required.' response and tests cover this case.

risks.title: Local SQLite lock under concurrent access
risks.plan: Move to server DB (e.g. Postgres) and add retry/backoff handling for write contention.

risks.title: No authentication for todo operations
risks.plan: Introduce platform-backed auth headers and restrict API calls per demo user context.

risks.title: Prompt-based editing may reduce usability
risks.plan: Replace browser prompts with inline form editing and richer client-side validation.
